phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a oficina de cestaria?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH aw-fee-SEE-nuh DIH sehsh-tuh-REEUH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao vendedor ou ao mestre cesteiro.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR OHW OW MEHSHT-rih sehsh-TAY-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the shop assistant or the basket maker.

responses.english: Ask the shop assistant or the basket maker.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR OHW OW MEHSHT-rih sehsh-TAY-roo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao vendedor ou ao mestre cesteiro.

phrases.text_local: Pode me recomendar uma boa loja de artesanato típico por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih MIH reh-koo-mayng-DAHR OO-muh BOHUH LAW-zhuh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too TEE-pee-koo POOR uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um artesão ou vendedor, como um mestre cesteiro ou um atendente de bordados.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG uh-ruh-tih-ZOWN OHW vayng-dih-DOHR, KOH-moo OONNG MEHSHT-rih sehsh-TAY-roo OHW OONNG uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH boo-ruh-DAH-doosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a craft artisan or shop assistant, such as a basket maker or an embroidery stall attendant.

responses.english: Ask a craft artisan or shop assistant, such as a basket maker or an embroidery stall attendant.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG uh-ruh-tih-ZOWN OHW vayng-dih-DOHR, KOH-moo OONNG MEHSHT-rih sehsh-TAY-roo OHW OONNG uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH boo-ruh-DAH-doosh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um artesão ou vendedor, como um mestre cesteiro ou um atendente de bordados.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar as barracas de bordados locais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR UHSH buh-RAH-kuhsh DIH boo-ruh-DAH-doosh loo-KEYESH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um vendedor ou artesão na rua. Eles podem indicar a localização exata.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR OHW uh-ruh-tih-ZOWN NUH ROOUH. EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN eh-ZAH-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a vendor or artisan on the street. They can point you to the exact location.

responses.english: Ask a vendor or artisan on the street. They can point you to the exact location.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR OHW uh-ruh-tih-ZOWN NUH ROOUH. EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN eh-ZAH-tuh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um vendedor ou artesão na rua. Eles podem indicar a localização exata.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I taste Madeira wine?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso provar o vinho da Madeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo proo-VAHR AW VEE-nyoo DUH muh-DAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Madeira wine tasting highlights the island's unique volcanic terroir and aging process.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, dirija-se aos cantos de degustação.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH UHOOSH KAHNNG-toosh DIH dih-goosh-tuh-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go to the tasting corners.

responses.english: Good morning, go to the tasting corners.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH UHOOSH KAHNNG-toosh DIH dih-goosh-tuh-SOWN.
responses.local: Bom dia, dirija-se aos cantos de degustação.

phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde é a oficina de vime?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih EH AH aw-fee-SEE-nuh DIH VEE-mih?
phrases.cultural_note: Workshops in Funchal's Rua do Aljube are often tucked away at the back or upper floors; staff will point you directly.

likely_response.local: No fundo do corredor, à esquerda.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO FOONNG-doo DOO koo-rih-DOHR, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the corridor, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the corridor, on the left.
responses.phonetic: NOO FOONNG-doo DOO koo-rih-DOHR, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
responses.local: No fundo do corredor, à esquerda.
